signals.headline: Crypto Market Rally on April 22, 2026: Bitcoin at $78,794 (up 4
signals.raw:
Crypto Market Rally on April 22, 2026: Bitcoin at $78,794 (up 4.3%), Ethereum at $2,399 (up 3.4%) Amid ETF Inflows** | YES | HIGH confidence[3]

Ethereum and Bitcoin are experiencing a confirmed short-term rally as of April 22, 2026 (8:00 p.m. UTC), with **ETH up 3.4%** to $2,399.44 and **BTC up 4.3%** to $78,794.56, driven by Bitcoin ETF inflows providing spot support despite derivatives weakness
